title: taraxacum neuolobum
intro: Taraxacum neuolobum, also known as the New Zealand dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus Taraxacum. This plant is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, containing taraxasterol, which is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum neuolobum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and support digestive health. Taraxacum neuolobum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies.
